name: @visuelconcept/wui-app-security
description: Application Security — standalone WinCC OA WebUI page (/app-security): discover the ROLES each page module expects (para, fleet-3d, process-monitor…) and map every role to WinCC OA user GROUPS. One datapoint per module (AppSecurity_<module>): the providing module declares its roles (.roles), this page writes the group assignments (.assignments). Pages gate their UI with the wui-kit hasRole$ primitive; sensitive backend routes enforce the same rules server-side (/api/app-security identity endpoints + requireRole guard).
